dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: Three out of four reasoning spans successfully passed schema validation, demonstrating strong adherence to output contracts. The alignment-engine step failed due to an external provider timeout, which temporarily halted governance enforcement.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The pipeline maintained a logical causal progression from context loading to architecture work mapping and intent generation. The execution of three intended reasoning spans indicates a coherent causal chain, despite the interruption at the alignment stage.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map and architecture-intent-generator spans executed successfully, indicating effective surfacing of architectural trade-offs and intent derivation. The alignment step failure limits full resolution assessment.

metadata.error_details: alignment-engine step failed with Huggingface 504 Gateway Timeout
